# Woodstyle Joinery

> Bespoke joinery and woodwork handcrafted in Carlisle, Cumbria since 1988. We design and build custom kitchens, fitted bedrooms, conservatories, orangeries, garages, and garden structures for homes across Cumbria and the North of England.

## About

Woodstyle Joinery is a family-run bespoke joinery business based at Wood Bank Farm, Brisco, Carlisle, Cumbria (CA4 0QP). Founded in 1988 by Alan Dickinson, the business has over 35 years of experience crafting custom woodwork. With 10+ skilled joiners and 500+ completed projects, Woodstyle serves customers across Cumbria and beyond.

## Services

- **Bespoke Kitchens** — farmhouse, shaker, contemporary, and rustic styles; custom islands and storage solutions
- **Fitted Bedrooms & Dressing Rooms** — floor-to-ceiling wardrobes, master bedrooms, children's bedrooms, dressing islands
- **Conservatories & Orangeries** — classical Victorian designs, oak-framed construction, low-maintenance hardwood
- **Garages & Workshops** — single, double, oak-framed; carports, log stores, hobby workshops
- **Design Services** — CAD planning, drawings for approval, email-based amendments before manufacture

## Contact

- Phone: 01228 512303
- Email: info@woodstylejoinery.co.uk
- Address: Wood Bank Farm, Brisco, Carlisle, Cumbria, CA4 0QP
- Hours: Mon–Fri 9am–5pm, Sat 10am–2pm
